questions.q: Which aviation training institute was the only one to achieve the top 'A' category in the 2nd phase rankings of Flying Training Organisations (FTOs)?
questions.exp: Correct answer: B. Avyanna Aviation Pvt. Ltd. was the only FTO in the top 'A' category; remember Avyanna = A category.

questions.q: The rankings for Flying Training Organisations (FTOs) were compiled by which authority?
questions.exp: Correct answer: C. DGCA compiled the FTO rankings; important for aviation regulatory-body questions.

questions.q: The Central Cottage Industries Corporation of India launched its inaugural heritage designer collection under which title?
questions.exp: Correct answer: B. CCIC launched 'Soul Threads' to promote textile traditions; memory hook: soul of India in threads.

questions.q: E-PRAAPTI, proposed by EPFO, is mainly related to which purpose?
options: Tracking inoperative EPF accounts and linking them with UAN
Issuing new pension cards to senior citizens
Providing instant loans against EPF balance
questions.exp: Correct answer: A. E-PRAAPTI will help identify, track, link UAN and activate old EPF accounts; important for social-security digital initiatives.

questions.q: How many claims did EPFO settle in 2025-26, as mentioned in the current affairs update?
questions.exp: Correct answer: C. EPFO settled a record 8.31 crore claims in 2025-26; compare with 6.01 crore in 2024-25.

questions.q: Which agency has been recognised as the Past Risk and Return Verification Agency (PaRRVA) by SEBI?
questions.exp: Correct answer: C. CARE Ratings Ltd. was recognised for PaRRVA; useful for SEBI-platform and market-regulation questions.

questions.q: Which organisation will act as the PaRRVA Data Centre (PDC) for SEBI's PaRRVA platform?
options: National Stock Exchange of India Limited
questions.exp: Correct answer: B. NSE will act as the PaRRVA Data Centre; remember PaRRVA verification + NSE data centre.

questions.q: The MuleHunter.AI tool, directed by the Ministry of Finance for banks, has been developed by which institution?
questions.exp: Correct answer: B. MuleHunter.AI was developed by RBIH to detect mule accounts; important for banking fraud-prevention awareness.

questions.q: As per the update, MuleHunter.AI was live in how many banks?
questions.exp: Correct answer: C. MuleHunter.AI was live in 26 banks; hook: 26 banks catching mule accounts.

questions.q: Federal Bank is set to acquire a select India credit card portfolio from which bank?
questions.exp: Correct answer: C. Federal Bank will acquire about 4.5 lakh cards from Standard Chartered Bank; relevant for banking M&A/current banking affairs.

questions.q: What is the approximate outstanding book value of the credit card portfolio Federal Bank plans to acquire from Standard Chartered Bank?
questions.exp: Correct answer: C. The portfolio outstanding book is about Rs 1,500 crore; pair Federal Bank + SCB + Rs 1,500 crore.

questions.q: Under RBI's 2026 amendment directions, eligible NBFCs below what asset size may be exempted from registration if they do not take public funds and have no customer interface?
questions.exp: Correct answer: C. Such NBFCs with assets below Rs 1,000 crore may be exempted; very important for RBI/NBFC regulation.

questions.q: From which date will the RBI's 2026 NBFC registration exemption amendment directions come into effect?
questions.exp: Correct answer: B. The directions will come into effect from July 1, 2026; remember July = NBFC rule effective date.

questions.q: DRDO and the Indian Navy conducted the maiden salvo launch of which missile from a naval helicopter platform?
questions.exp: Correct answer: B. NASM-SR was tested from a Navy helicopter platform; key defence fact for missile-current-affairs questions.

questions.q: The Naval Anti-ship Missile-Short Range (NASM-SR) system was developed by which Hyderabad-based DRDO centre?
questions.exp: Correct answer: A. NASM-SR was developed by Research Centre Imarat with other DRDO labs; remember RCI Hyderabad.

questions.q: The 4th edition of the India-Sri Lanka bilateral diving exercise 'IN-SLN DIVEX 2026' was held in which city?
questions.exp: Correct answer: C. IN-SLN DIVEX 2026 was held in Colombo; useful for India-Sri Lanka defence exercise questions.

questions.q: Which Indian Navy vessel was deployed for IN-SLN DIVEX 2026?
questions.exp: Correct answer: A. INS Nireekshak, a Diving Support and Submarine Rescue Vessel, was deployed; hook: Nireekshak = underwater inspection.

questions.q: Who became the fastest player to reach 400 runs in a single IPL season in terms of balls faced during IPL 2026?
questions.exp: Correct answer: C. Vaibhav Sooryavanshi reached 400 runs in just 167 balls; remember the 15-year-old Rajasthan Royals opener.

questions.q: Virat Kohli became the first batter in IPL history to achieve which milestone?
questions.exp: Correct answer: A. Kohli became the first IPL batter to hit 800 fours; exam hook: Kohli = first to 800 IPL fours.

questions.q: India will host the SAFF Women's Championship 2026 at which venue?
questions.exp: Correct answer: C. The 2026 SAFF Women's Championship will be held at Fatorda Stadium, Margao, Goa; remember SAFF Women 2026 = Goa.
